scripts.build:all: pnpm --filter @postwave/shared build && pnpm --filter @postwave/core build && pnpm --filter @postwave/storage-sqlite build && pnpm --filter @postwave/cli build && pnpm --filter @postwave/worker build && pnpm --filter @postwave/web build && pnpm --filter @postwave/desktop build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @postwave/shared test && pnpm --filter @postwave/core test && pnpm --filter @postwave/storage-sqlite test && pnpm --filter @postwave/cli test
